content.full_text:
JOHN
PHILLIPS
DISTRICT ATTORNEY
San Joaquin County

Office of the District Attorney
San Joaquin County Courthouse, Rm. 202
222 E Weber Ave. Stockton, California 95202
P.O.Box 990, Stockton, California 95201
Telephone:(209) 944-3811

February 1, 1990

Fair Political Practices Board
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA  95804-0807

Attention:  Margaret Ellison

Ms. Ellison:

Please send a note confirming our conversation regarding donation
to Injured Police Officer's Trust Fund.

Sincerely,

JOHN D. PHILLIPS,
District Attorney

JDP/sd
